name: Warner Motors
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in East Orange, NJ offering in-house financing to customers with bad credit, with credit bureau reporting to help rebuild credit.
description_long:
Warner Motors is a buy here pay here used car dealership located at 20 N. Park Street in East Orange, New Jersey. The dealership specializes in serving customers who have been denied financing elsewhere due to poor credit scores or financial difficulties. Founded on the principle that good people sometimes face temporary credit challenges, Warner Motors positions itself as a fresh-start lender for individuals struggling to access traditional auto financing.

The company offers in-house auto financing for used vehicles without requiring customers to obtain loans from third-party lenders. They advertise late-model vehicles and provide flexible payment arrangements, including biweekly payment options. A key component of their service is the "Worry Free" limited warranty included with every vehicle sold, which they claim is one of the best warranty programs in New Jersey. The warranty appears to include roadside assistance and comprehensive coverage options.

Warner Motors distinguishes itself through monthly credit bureau reporting to Equifax and TransUnion, a practice they emphasize as differentiating them from smaller buy here pay here competitors. This reporting allows customers to rebuild their credit history through on-time vehicle payments. Customer reviews consistently highlight the family-oriented approach of staff members (Dan, John, Norman, and Shalitha are mentioned by name), flexible down payment negotiations, and simplified financing processes compared to traditional dealerships.

As a buy here pay here lender, Warner Motors operates in a high-risk lending space where customers typically have limited alternatives. While the credit bureau reporting and warranty coverage are genuine benefits, customers should understand that buy here pay here financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than prime auto lending, and payment defaults may result in vehicle repossession. The company's business model depends on regular payment collection, making it essential for borrowers to commit to the payment schedule.
address: 20 N Park St, East Orange, NJ 07017

company_info.headquarters: 20 N Park St, East Orange, NJ 07017

pros: Reports monthly payments to Equifax and TransUnion credit bureaus, enabling credit rebuilding for customers with poor credit
Includes "Worry Free" limited warranty with every vehicle, featuring roadside assistance and comprehensive coverage options
Flexible down payment negotiation and biweekly payment options accommodated based on individual customer circumstances
In-house financing eliminates need for third-party lenders, streamlining approval process for customers with bad credit
Established buy here pay here dealer in New Jersey market with documented multi-year customer retention (one customer mentioned 3+ years)
Same-day vehicle purchase approval and delivery capability
Staff availability for phone, text, and in-person consultations with named, consistent team members
cons: Buy here pay here financing typically carries significantly higher interest rates than traditional auto loans, though APR not disclosed on website
Vehicle repossession is implicit risk if payments are missed, as payment collection is core business model
Limited to used vehicle inventory only; no new cars available
Geographically restricted to East Orange, NJ location with no indication of multiple locations or online remote financing
No transparent pricing, payment terms, or APR information provided on website for comparison shopping
best_for: Individuals with bad credit or recent credit damage (divorce, job loss, medical issues) who have been denied by traditional lenders
First-time car buyers with limited credit history who need flexible financing and credit-building opportunity
Used car buyers prioritizing credit bureau reporting for credit score improvement over lowest-cost financing
Customers in New Jersey area who value in-person relationship-based lending and flexible payment negotiations
diagnosis: Warner Motors is best for credit-challenged consumers in the New Jersey area who prioritize credit rebuilding through reported payments over the lowest-cost financing option. The key caveat is that buy here pay here financing comes with significantly higher rates and repossession risk if payments are missed; this is appropriate only for borrowers committed to consistent biweekly payments and with reliable income.
services: Buy here pay here in-house auto financing for used vehicles
Credit-challenged customer approval and financing decisions
Flexible down payment negotiation and structuring
Monthly credit bureau reporting to Equifax and TransUnion
"Worry Free" limited warranty on all vehicles sold
Used vehicle inventory selection and sales
Customer service via phone, text, and in-person consultation
Vehicle financing approval and loan processing
